subject: PhonePe payment infrastructure
body:
Namaste,

PhonePe ki core infrastructure growth bahut impressive hai. Hum ChronoReach me AI outreach build kar rahe hain jo bilkul SDR ki tarah human timing models pe run karti hai (Gaussian jitter, working hours).

Kya aap next week 10 min connect karna chahenge?

Dhanyavad,
Ravi
